_comment: Per-project MCP server config. Empty by default — most MCPs are user-level (configured in Cowork/Claude Desktop) and don't need to be repeated here. Use this file only for MCPs that are project-specific (e.g. a database connection that's only relevant to THIS repo).

github._doc: GitHub MCP — PRs, issues, repos. Token must be set in env, never hardcoded.

postgres._doc: Postgres MCP — direct queries against a database. URL must be set in env.

filesystem._doc: Filesystem MCP — scoped file access. Adjust the path to your project root.

playwright._doc: Playwright MCP — browser automation for tests / scraping.
